# Conclusion {-}

```{=html}
<style>
/* -- HERO -- */
.kg-hero {
  background: linear-gradient(140deg, var(--navy) 0%, #163351 55%, #0e2640 100%);
  border-radius: var(--radius);
  padding: 3.5rem 3rem;
  margin-bottom: 2.5rem;
  text-align: center;
  position: relative;
  overflow: hidden;
}
.kg-hero::before {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  top: -80px; right: -60px;
  width: 340px; height: 340px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(0,194,168,0.18) 0%, transparent 70%);
  pointer-events: none;
}
.kg-hero::after {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  bottom: -70px; left: -50px;
  width: 280px; height: 280px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(108,99,255,0.15) 0%, transparent 70%);
  pointer-events: none;
}
.kg-hero-eyebrow {
  font-size: 0.72rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: 0.18em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--teal);
  margin-bottom: 1rem;
  position: relative;
  z-index: 1;
}
.kg-hero-title {
  font-family: var(--font-display);
  font-size: 2.4rem;
  font-weight: 900;
  color: #fff;
  line-height: 1.2;
  margin-bottom: 1.2rem;
  position: relative;
  z-index: 1;
}
.kg-hero-title span { color: var(--teal); }
.kg-hero-sub {
  font-size: 1.05rem;
  color: rgba(255,255,255,0.75);
  line-height: 1.75;
  max-width: 580px;
  margin: 0 auto 2rem;
  position: relative;
  z-index: 1;
}

/* -- TRUTH CARDS -- */
.kg-truth-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
  gap: 1rem;
  margin: 1.4rem 0 2.5rem;
}
.kg-truth-card {
  background: var(--white);
  border: 1.5px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: var(--radius);
  padding: 1.4rem 1.2rem;
  box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm);
  text-align: center;
  position: relative;
  overflow: hidden;
  transition: box-shadow 0.18s, transform 0.18s;
}
.kg-truth-card:hover {
  box-shadow: var(--shadow-md);
  transform: translateY(-2px);
}
.kg-truth-card::before {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  top: 0; left: 0; right: 0;
  height: 4px;
  background: var(--teal);
}
.kg-truth-icon {
  font-size: 2rem;
  margin-bottom: 0.7rem;
}
.kg-truth-title {
  font-size: 0.97rem;
  font-weight: 800;
  color: var(--navy);
  margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
}
.kg-truth-desc {
  font-size: 0.83rem;
  color: var(--text-muted);
  line-height: 1.65;
}

/* -- QUOTE BLOCK -- */
.kg-quote {
  background: var(--white);
  border: 1.5px solid var(--border);
  border-left: 5px solid var(--teal);
  border-radius: 0 var(--radius) var(--radius) 0;
  padding: 1.8rem 2rem;
  margin: 2rem 0;
  box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm);
}
.kg-quote-text {
  font-family: var(--font-display);
  font-size: 1.25rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: var(--navy);
  line-height: 1.6;
  margin-bottom: 0.6rem;
}
.kg-quote-author {
  font-size: 0.82rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: var(--text-muted);
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.1em;
}

/* -- CLOSING -- */
.kg-closing {
  background: linear-gradient(140deg, var(--navy) 0%, #163351 100%);
  border-radius: var(--radius);
  padding: 3rem;
  text-align: center;
  position: relative;
  overflow: hidden;
  margin-top: 3rem;
}
.kg-closing::before {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  top: -60px; right: -60px;
  width: 260px; height: 260px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(0,194,168,0.15) 0%, transparent 70%);
  pointer-events: none;
}
.kg-closing-title {
  font-family: var(--font-display);
  font-size: 1.8rem;
  font-weight: 900;
  color: #fff;
  margin-bottom: 0.8rem;
  position: relative;
  z-index: 1;
}
.kg-closing-title span { color: var(--teal); }
.kg-closing-text {
  font-size: 1rem;
  color: rgba(255,255,255,0.75);
  line-height: 1.75;
  max-width: 560px;
  margin: 0 auto;
  position: relative;
  z-index: 1;
}
</style>

<!-- Hero -->
<div class="kg-hero">
  <div class="kg-hero-eyebrow">A Note From Us to You...</div>
  <div class="kg-hero-title">The Right Opportunity<br><span>Is Coming</span></div>
  <div class="kg-hero-sub">The job search is hard. It's supposed to be. But every rejection, every silence, and every setback is part of the process.</div>
</div>

<!-- Section: What Nobody Tells You -->
<h2 style="font-family:var(--font-display);color:var(--navy);font-size:1.5rem;margin-bottom:0.4rem;">What Nobody Tells You</h2>
<p style="font-size:0.95rem;color:var(--text-muted);margin-bottom:0;">The things that make this process feel impossible are the same things everyone else is experiencing.</p>

<div class="kg-truth-grid">
  <div class="kg-truth-card">
    <div class="kg-truth-icon">📭</div>
    <div class="kg-truth-title">Not Hearing Back Is Normal</div>
    <div class="kg-truth-desc">Many applications never receive a response. This is common and not a reflection of your ability or potential. Keep applying and focus on what you can control.</div>
  </div>
  <div class="kg-truth-card">
    <div class="kg-truth-icon">🛑</div>
    <div class="kg-truth-title">A Rejection Is Not a Verdict</div>
    <div class="kg-truth-desc">One company’s decision does not define your potential. Rejection is part of the process and often reflects fit or timing rather than your ability. Keep moving forward.</div>
  </div>
  <div class="kg-truth-card">
    <div class="kg-truth-icon">🌱</div>
    <div class="kg-truth-title">Every Step Builds Something</div>
    <div class="kg-truth-desc">Every application, every interview, every networking conversation is making you sharper. None of it is wasted, even when it does not feel that way.</div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="kg-quote">
  <div class="kg-quote-text">"You are not behind. You are on your own timeline, and the right opportunity does not care about anyone else's schedule."</div>
  <div class="kg-quote-author">The Grad Guide</div>
</div>

<!-- Closing -->
<div class="kg-closing">
  <div class="kg-closing-title">Go Get <span> What's Yours</span></div>
  <div class="kg-closing-text">This is not the end of the guide. It's the beginning of everything that comes next. Trust the process. Trust yourself. The right door will open.<br>We are rooting for you.<br><br>- The Grad Guide Team</div>
</div>
```
